# Template — International Transfer Annex (IDTA / SCCs)

**Version:** 1.0.0 (outline)  
**Date:** 2026-06-07  
**Owner:** DPO  
**Use:** SUP-004 (US AI fallback), SUP-005 (US health connectors), other non-adequate transfers

---

## Selection guide

| Transfer | Mechanism |
|----------|-----------|
| UK → UK | No transfer mechanism required |
| UK → EEA adequacy | Adequacy (document in ROPA) |
| UK → US (standard) | UK IDTA or EU SCCs + UK Addendum |
| EU → third country | EU SCCs 2021 |

## Annex content (per transfer)

1. **Exporter:** Trancendos Ltd
2. **Importer:** [Supplier legal name and country]
3. **Data categories:** As per DPA Annex I
4. **Transfer frequency:** Continuous / batch
5. **Supplementary measures:** Encryption in transit (TLS 1.2+); encryption at rest; access controls; pseudonymisation where feasible
6. **TIA reference:** Transfer impact assessment ID (DPO file)
7. **Sub-processor disclosure:** Link to customer schedule

## Checklist

- [ ] TIA completed and approved by DPO
- [ ] IDTA or SCC module selected (ICO / EU Commission templates)
- [ ] Signed with DPA
- [ ] Recorded in ROPA and supplier register

**Related:** [GDPR-ALIGNMENT.md](../compliance/GDPR-ALIGNMENT.md) · [SUPPLIER-DPA-REGISTER.md](../compliance/SUPPLIER-DPA-REGISTER.md)
